official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound transfer body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns transfer to packet id 0x81.
The official transfer body is UTF-8 host string followed by VarInt port.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, host, port, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer runtime transfer handling.
